description: Autocoder — autonomous coding-agent CLI (mini Claude Code). LLM-driven agent loop with a tool interface (read/list/search/write/edit/run-command), filesystem sandboxing (read-anywhere, write/exec-in-root), command-approval policy, diff generation, retries, config, and run transcripts. TS/Node + Anthropic SDK + Vitest. 22 functional + 8 non-functional requirements.
